lockingPolicy.lockReason: Artifact-shape regression scenarios are the contractual proof of the supersession-pointer fix; any future change to the scenario set requires explicit invalidation evidence per Gate G058/G059.

tdd.rationale: Artifact-only documentation drift; zero runtime code changed. Per policySnapshot.tdd.mode = exempt with user-request provenance.
tdd.redGreenEvidence: Red state: three greps for '042-tailnet-edge-bind-pattern' against state.json/spec.md/design.md exit 1 pre-fix (report.md). Green state: same three greps exit 0 post-fix; L269 bare-phrase no longer appears in spec.md; change-boundary confined to specs/020-security-hardening/.

spec.md carries an inline supersession note
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: grep -q '042-tailnet-edge-bind-pattern' specs/020-security-hardening/spec.md exits 0 with match above or inside the Attack Surface: Network Exposure section

scenarios.liveTestExpectation: grep -q '042-tailnet-edge-bind-pattern' specs/020-security-hardening/design.md exits 0 at the top of the document
